mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_condition ( userid, name, market, created_at ) VALUES ( #{userid}, #{name}, #{market}, NOW() )

INSERT INTO user_condition_filter ( condition_id, filter_key ) VALUES
(#{conditionId}, #{filterKey})

INSERT INTO user_condition_etf ( condition_id, etf_id, etf_name ) VALUES
(#{conditionId}, #{etf.etfId}, #{etf.etfName})
mapper.select: SELECT id, userid, name, market, DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS createdAt FROM user_condition WHERE userid = #{userid} ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT etf_id AS etfId, etf_name AS etfName FROM user_condition_etf WHERE condition_id = #{conditionId}
SELECT id, userid, name, market, DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS createdAt FROM user_condition WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM user_condition WHERE id = #{id} AND userid = #{userid}
